title: dealt_force_skills
description: A Forge combat mod that adds tactical operator-style characters, active skills, gadgets, equipment, and character selection to Minecraft.
body:
Dealt Force Skills

Dealt Force Skills is a Minecraft Forge combat mod that adds tactical operator-style characters, active skills, custom equipment, materials, and combat mechanics to Minecraft.

The mod is designed for players who want more character-based combat instead of only using vanilla weapons and armor. Each playable character has a different role, skill set, and gameplay style, so you can choose a character that fits how you want to fight in PvP, PvE, or general survival gameplay.

This is an unofficial fan-made project inspired by tactical operator games. It is not an official Delta Force project and is not affiliated with the owners of Delta Force.


What does this mod add?

Dealt Force Skills currently adds:

- A character selection system
- 21 playable characters
- Multiple character roles, including Assault, Support, Engineer, Recon, and Special characters
- Unique active skills and character mechanics
- Custom tactical equipment, materials, and items
- Combat tools designed for both PvP and PvE gameplay
- Character abilities that focus on timing, positioning, counterplay, and different combat styles

The goal of the mod is to make Minecraft combat feel more tactical and varied. Instead of every player fighting in the same way, players can choose different characters with different strengths, weaknesses, and utility.


Playable characters

There are currently 21 playable characters available.

Assault

- D-Wolf
- Vyron
- Nox
- Tempest

Support

- Stinger
- Toxik
- Vlinder

Engineer

- Sineva
- Uluru
- Gizmo
- Shepherd

Recon

- Luna
- Hackclaw
- Morse
- Raptor

Special

These characters are original or community-submitted characters created for this mod.

- Manba
- Nikaidou Hiro
- CatDad
- Department
- Undead
- Lex_Ninjia

The character list, balance, skill effects, and visuals may change in future versions as the mod continues development.


## How to use the mod

After entering the game, open the character selection interface and choose a character.

You can access the character selection interface from the character selection panel when entering the game. In creative mode, you can also open it through the character selection interface button.

After selecting a character, you can use that character's skills, equipment, and mechanics in combat. Different characters are designed for different situations, such as direct fighting, support, traps, drones, shields, scouting, or special utility.


Why download this mod?

Download this mod if you want:

- More tactical combat options in Minecraft
- Playable characters with different skill sets
- PvP and PvE combat with more variety
- Operator-style abilities, gadgets, and equipment
- A mod that focuses on mechanics and character identity instead of only adding stronger weapons or armor

This mod is especially suitable for players or servers that want class-based combat, character selection, custom PvP modes, or a more ability-focused survival experience.


Important information

This project is still under active development.

APIs, mechanics, balance values, assets, compatibility behavior, textures, models, and sounds may change between versions. Some armor textures and visual assets may still be improved in later updates.

Please check the Versions tab for the correct Minecraft version and Forge version before downloading.

This mod is intended to work on both the client and the server when used in multiplayer.
